cards.name: General “Thunderbolt” Ross
abilities: Start of Game: Stack 8 Bystanders next to General Ross as “Helicopter“ Villains with 2[icon:attack]. You can fight them to rescue them as Bystanders. You can't fight General Ross while he has any Helicopters.
Always Leads: Code Red
Master Strike: General Ross [keyword:Transforms], then [keyword:Cross-Dimensional Hulk Rampage].

cards.name: Red Hulk
abilities: [keyword:Wounded Fury]
You can't fight Helicopters, and they don't stop you from fighting Red Hulk.

Master Strike: Red Hulk [keyword:Transforms], then stack a random Bystander from each player's Victory Pile next to this as a Helicopter. Each player who didn't have a Bystander gains a Wound instead.

cards.name: Bust You Down to Private
abilities: Fight: Each other player puts a non-grey Hero from their hand on the bottom of the Hero Deck, then puts a 0-cost Hero from the KO pile into their hand.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Call Out the Army
abilities: Fight: Put 3 Bystanders from the Bystander Stack next to this Mastermind as “Helicopters.“
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Personal Arsenal
abilities: Fight: For each Master Strike in the KO pile, put a Bystander from the Bystander Stack next to the Mastermind as a “Helicopter.“
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Urban Warfare
abilities: Fight: Put a random Bystander next to the Mastermind as a “Helicopter“ from each of these places: The Bystander Stack, the Escape Pile, each city space, and each other player's Victory Pile.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Illuminati, Secret Society
abilities: This Mastermind gets +4[icon:attack] unless you [keyword:Outwit] them.
Always Leads: Illuminati
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand and discards two cards that each cost between 1 and 4. The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: Illuminati, Open Warfare
abilities: Whenever a card effect causes a player to draw any number of cards, that player must then also discard a card.
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand and discards two cards that each cost between 5 and 8. The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: Black Bolt's Omni-Shout
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards two cards with no rules text.
The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: Dr. Strange's Orb of Agamotto
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards a [hc:ranged] or [hc:instinct] Hero.
The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: Hulkbuster's Hammer Fist
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and KOs a [hc:tech] or [hc:strength] Hero from their hand or discard pile.
The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: Zom's Manacles of Living Bondage
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or gains a Wound.
The Illuminati [keyword:Transform].

cards.name: King Hulk, Sakaarson
abilities: King Hulk gets +1[icon:attack] for each Warbound Villain in the city and in the Escape Pile.
Always Leads: Warbound
Master Strike: Each player KO's a Warbound Villain from their Victory Pile or gains a Wound. King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: King Hulk, Worldbreaker
abilities: [keyword:Wounded Fury]
Master Strike: Each player reveals their hand, then KO's a card from their hand or discard pile that has the same card name as a card in the HQ. King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Fury of the Green Scar
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards a Hero that isn't grey and isn't [hc:strength].
King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Oath of the Warbound
abilities: Fight: The Villain in the Escape Pile with the highest printed [icon:attack] enters the Sewers.
King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Revenge from the Stars
abilities: Fight: After you put this in your Victory Pile, [keyword:Cross-Dimensional Hulk Rampage].
King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Rule By the Strongest
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each of your [hc:strength] Heroes.
King Hulk [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: M.O.D.O.K.
abilities: All cards' [keyword:Outwit] abilities require four different costs instead of three.
Always Leads: Intelligencia
Master Strike: Each player who can't [keyword:Outwit] M.O.D.O.K. gains a Wound, then M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: M.O.D.O.K., Network Nightmare
abilities: You can only fight M.O.D.O.K. with [icon:recruit], not [icon:attack].
Master Strike: Each player who can't [keyword:Outwit] M.O.D.O.K. KO's a non-grey Hero from their discard pile. M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Brain Scramble
abilities: Fight: Each other player discards their hand, then draws as many cards as they discarded.
M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Designed Only For...K.O.ING
abilities: Fight: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. KO one of them, draw one, and discard one.
M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Don't Get a Big head About It
abilities: Fight: Draw a card for each Intelligencia Villain in your Victory Pile.
M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Redundancy Algorithim
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discards two cards that hand the same cost.
M.O.D.O.K. [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: The Red King
abilities: You can't fight the Red King while any Villains are in the city.
Always Leads: Sakaar Imperial Guard
Master Strike: The Red King [keyword:Transforms], then each player reveals a [hc:tech] card or gains a Wound.

cards.name: The Red King, Power Armored

cards.name: Haughty Spite
abilities: Fight: Each other player without a Red King Tactic in their Victory Pile gains a Wound.

cards.name: Royal Bodyguard
abilities: Fight: Reveal cards from the Villain Deck until you reveal a Sakaar Imperial Guard. If you find one, play it. Either way, shuffle all the other revealed cards back into the Villain Deck.

cards.name: Treasury of Sakaar
abilities: Fight: You get +1[icon:recruit] for each Sakaar Imperial Guard and Red King Tactic in your Victory Pile, including this one.
The Red King [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Vast Armies of Sakaar
abilities: Fight: If this is not the final Tactic, reveal the top three cards of the Villain Deck. Play all the Villains you revealed. Put the rest back in random order.
The Red King [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: The Sentry
abilities: Start of Game: Shuffle 2 Wounds into each player's deck before drawing starting hands.
Always Leads: Aspects of the Void
Master Strike: The Sentry [keyword:Transforms], then [keyword:Cross-Dimensional Void Rampage].

cards.name: The Void
abilities: [keyword:Wounded Fury]

cards.name: Pacifying Light
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals their hand and discard two cards with [icon:recruit] icons.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Power of a Million Exploding Suns
abilities: Fight: Put all Heroes from the HQ on the bottom of the Hero Deck. Each other player reveals their hand and discards each card with the same card name as any of those cards.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Reflexive Teleportation
abilities: Fight: Choose one of your Heroes that costs 5 or less. When you draw a new hand of cards at the end of this turn, add that Hero to your hand as an extra card.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

cards.name: Repressed Darkness
abilities: Fight: Each other player reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero or plays an Aspects of the Void Villain from their Victory Pile as if playing it from the Villain Deck.
This Mastermind [keyword:Transforms].

abilities: Fight: Each player simultaneously puts a card from their discard pile into the discard pile of the player to their right.

cards.name: Demonform
abilities: Fight: [keyword:Feast]. If Demonform feasts on a non-grey Hero, gain a Hero from the HQ of that cost or less.

cards.name: Psychotic Break

abilities: Fight: You get +2[icon:recruit].

cards.name: Caught Red-Handed

Or Suffer: (After you draw your new hand) Each player reveals a [hc:covert] Hero or gains a Wound.

cards.name: Black Bolt

cards.name: Dr. Strange
abilities: Ambush: Each player who can't [keyword:Outwit] Dr. Strange discards a card.

cards.name: Dr. Strange, Possessed by Zom

Ambush: This Villain captures 3 Bystanders.

cards.name: Enchain the Hulk

Or Suffer: (After you draw your new hand) [keyword:Cross-Dimensional Hulk Rampage]

cards.name: Hulkbuster Iron Man
abilities: Hulkbuster Iron Man gets +3[icon:attack] unless you [keyword:Outwit] him.
Escape: [keyword:Cross-Dimensional Illuminati Rampage]

cards.name: Battle of Wits

Or Suffer: (After you draw your new hand) Each player discards down to 4 cards.

cards.name: Cosmic Hulk Robot

Ambush: Each player who can't [keyword:Outwit] Cosmic Hulk Robot gains a Wound.

cards.name: Doc Samson

Fight: KO one of your Heroes. [effect:koHeroCurrentPlayer]

cards.name: The Leader, Gamma Fiend

cards.name: Gladiators' Colosseum
abilities: By End of Turn: Only play cards from a single Team of your choice this turn (e.g. [team:shield], [team:avengers], [team:x-men], [team:warbound], etc.)
Or Suffer: (After you draw your new hand) Each player reveals their hand, chooses a Team, and discards all cards that don't belong to that Team.

cards.name: Great Devil Corker
abilities: Fight: Look at the top three cards of your deck. Put them back in any order. Then [keyword:Feast].

cards.name: X-Ray
abilities: Fight: Each player who reveals a [hc:ranged] Hero may KO a card from their discard pile.

cards.name: Elloe Kaifi
abilities: Fight: Draw a card. Another player of your choice also draws a card.

cards.name: Hiroim
abilities: Fight: KO a card from the HQ. Each player reveals their hand and KO's a card with that same cost.

cards.name: Korg
abilities: Ambush: KO a Hero from the HQ. Each player reveals their hand and discards a card with that same cost.
Escape: Same effect.

cards.name: Miek The Unhived
abilities: Fight: Look at the top two cards of your deck. Put them back on the top and/or bottom. Then [keyword:Feast].

cards.name: No-Name, Brood Queen

cards.name: Warbound Rescue
abilities: By End of Turn: Put a Warbound Villain and Henchman Villain from your Victory Pile back into the city.
Or Suffer: Each player gains a Wound.

henchmen.name: Cytoplasm Spikes
abilities: Fight: [keyword:Feast]. If Cytoplasm Spikes feasts on a non-grey Hero, you get +2[icon:recruit].

henchmen.name: Death's Heads
abilities: Fight: If you [keyword:Outwit] these Death's Heads, KO one of your cards that costs 0.

henchmen.name: Sakaaran Hivelings
abilities: Fight: Look at the top card of your deck. Put it back on the top or bottom. Then [keyword:Feast].
Setup: 9 Twists. 7 Heroes.

Twist: Stack this Twist next to the Scheme as a “Tectonic Break.“ Then KO each Hero from the HQ whose printed [icon:attack] is less than the number of Tectonic Breaks (no printed [icon:attack] counts as 0).
Evil Wins: When 25 non-grey Heroes are KO'd.
Setup: 10 Twists. Shuffle together 20 Bystanders and 10 Cytoplasm Spike Henchmen as an “Infected Deck.“
Twist: Reveal the top three cards of the Infected Deck. KO all Bystanders you revealed. All Spikes you revealed enter the city.
Evil Wins: When the KO pile and Escape Pile combine to have 18 Bystanders and/or Spikes.
Setup: 10 Twists. 6 Wounds per player in Wound Stack. Use exactly two Heroes with “Hulk“ in their Hero Names.
Twist 3-6: [keyword:Cross-Dimension Hulk Rampage].
Twist 7-10: Each player gains a Wound.
Evil Wins: When the Wound Stack runs out.
Setup: 6 Twists.
Twist: Until the start of your next turn, each player can only play cards from a single Team of their choice during their turn. (e.g. [team:shield],[team:avengers],[team:x-men],[team:warbound], etc.)
Evil Wins: When 2 Villains per player have escaped or the Villain Deck runs out.
Setup: 7 Twists. Take 14 cards from an extra Hero with “Hulk“ in its Hero Name. Put them in a face-up “Mutation Pile.“

Twist 1-6: Each player in turn does the following: Put a non-grey Hero from your hand into the Mutation Pile. Then you may put a different card name with the same cost from the Mutation Pile into your discard pile.
Twist 7: Evil Wins!
Setup: 8 Twists. Take 14 cards from an extra Hero with “Hulk“ in its Hero Name. Shuffle them into a “Hulk Deck.“
Twist: Put 2 cards from the Hulk Deck into a face-up “Prison Ship“ stack next to the S.H.I.E.L.D. Officer Stack.
Special Rules: You may recruit the top card of the Prison Ship stack.
Evil Wins: When there are 10 cards in the Prison Ship or the Hulk Deck runs out.
Setup: 11 Twists.
Twist: Put this Twist under an HQ space as an “Obedience Disk.“ No space can have two more Obedience Disks than any other space.
Special Rules: To recruit a Hero in the HQ, you must also pay 1[icon:recruit] for each Obedience Disk under it.
Evil Wins: When each HQ space has 2 Obedience Disks.
Setup: 9 Twists. Put three additional Masterminds out of play, “Lurking.“ Each of the four Masterminds has two random Tactics.
Special Rules: When you defeat all of a Mastermind's Tactics, KO its face card and a random Lurking Mastermind enters play.
Twist 1-8: Swap the current Mastermind with a random Lurking Mastermind.
Twist 9: Evil Wins!
When you rescue this Bystander, choose a Hero in the HQ that costs 4 or less. You get its printed [icon:recruit] and [icon:attack].
When you rescue this Bystander, each [hc:instinct] and/or [hc:covert] Hero currently in the HQ costs 1 less this turn.
When you rescue this Bystander, you get +1[icon:recruit] if the Rooftops are empty and +1[icon:recruit] if the Bridge is empty.
When you rescue this Bystander, look at the top three cards of your deck. KO one, discard one, and put one back.
